title: SimpleOptimizer
description: Optimizer modpack that boosts fps (contains: sodium,sodium extra,reese' sodium options and iris shaders).
body: Optimizer modpack that boosts fps (contains: sodium,sodium extra,reese' sodium options and iris shaders). Optional: change render distanse becuse at default is 32 chunks. And it has such other fetures like crystaloptimizer,anchoroptimizer,tapshow,armorhud.
